content:
🌟 cap4d | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating animatable 4D portrait avatars from input images.
✨ Key Features: • Creation of animatable 4D portrait avatars • Utilizes morphable multi-view diffusion models • Supports generation from a few reference images • Includes a real-time viewer for exported animations • Provides scripts for quick start, inference, and custom inference
📖 Summary: CAP4D is an official repository for creating animatable 4D portrait avatars from a few reference images using morphable multi-view diffusion models. It enables the generation of dynamic 3D avatars that can be animated and viewed in real-time.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ AI-Asistent-Telegram | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automate and enhance communication for Telegram Business accounts by providing an AI assistant that can handle customer interactions, manage groups, and perform various utility tasks.
✨ Key Features: • AI-powered responses (GPT-4.1-mini or fallback API) • Token auto-rotation for GitHub API limits • Aggressive and caring response modes • Group administration commands (kick, ban, mute, spam protection)
📖 Summary: This Python repository provides a Telegram bot designed for Telegram Business accounts, acting as a personal AI assistant. It offers AI-powered responses, customizable interaction modes (business, aggressive, caring), and administrative tools for group management, alongside utility functions.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 ONIX-AternosBot | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Keeping Minecraft servers, particularly those hosted on platforms like Aternos, online and active 24/7 by simulating an active player, controlled conveniently via Telegram.
✨ Key Features: • Telegram-based menu for bot control (start, stop, logs, settings) • Live configuration changes (address, port, version, nickname, password) without restart • Automatic reconnection with configurable phases
📖 Summary: ONIX-AternosBot is a JavaScript-based Telegram bot designed to keep Minecraft servers running 24/7. It automates the process of maintaining an active player presence on Aternos servers, allowing users to control and manage the bot directly through a Telegram interface without needing direct server access or command-line interaction.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
